queries.question: For every beach resort, list all the water sports and their descriptions.
queries.sql: select beach_resorts.name , water_sports.name , water_sports.description from Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports join Water_Sports on Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports.SportID = Water_Sports.SportID join Beach_Resorts on Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports.ResortID = Beach_Resorts.ResortID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 ?description WHERE {
  ?beach_resorts_water_sports a :Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports .
  ?water_sports a :Water_Sports .
  ?beach_resorts_water_sports p:hasWater_Sports ?water_sports .
  ?beach_resorts a :Beach_Resorts .
  ?beach_resorts_water_sports p:hasBeach_Resorts ?beach_resorts .
  ?beach_resorts p:name ?name .
  ?water_sports p:name ?name2 .
  ?water_sports p:Description ?description .
}

queries.question: For each beach resort, list the water sports.
queries.sql: select beach_resorts.name , water_sports.name from Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports join Water_Sports on Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports.SportID = Water_Sports.SportID join Beach_Resorts on Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports.ResortID = Beach_Resorts.ResortID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?beach_resorts_water_sports a :Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports .
  ?water_sports a :Water_Sports .
  ?beach_resorts_water_sports p:hasWater_Sports ?water_sports .
  ?beach_resorts a :Beach_Resorts .
  ?beach_resorts_water_sports p:hasBeach_Resorts ?beach_resorts .
  ?beach_resorts p:name ?name .
  ?water_sports p:name ?name2 .
}

queries.question: List the water sports and their descriptions that are common to every beach resort.
queries.sql: SELECT Water_Sports.Name, Water_Sports.Description  from Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports join Water_Sports on Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports.SportID = Water_Sports.SportID join Beach_Resorts on Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports.ResortID = Beach_Resorts.ResortID   GROUP BY Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports.SportID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports.ResortID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Beach_Resorts)

queries.question: What are the descriptions of water sports all beach resorts have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Water_Sports.Description  from Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports join Water_Sports on Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports.SportID = Water_Sports.SportID join Beach_Resorts on Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports.ResortID = Beach_Resorts.ResortID   GROUP BY Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports.SportID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports.ResortID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Beach_Resorts)

queries.question: List the water sports available in each beach resort.
queries.sql: SELECT Water_Sports.Name  from Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports join Water_Sports on Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports.SportID = Water_Sports.SportID join Beach_Resorts on Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports.ResortID = Beach_Resorts.ResortID   GROUP BY Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports.SportID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports.ResortID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Beach_Resorts)

queries.question: Describe the water sports every beach resort has.
queries.sql: select beach_resorts.name , water_sports.description from Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports join Water_Sports on Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports.SportID = Water_Sports.SportID join Beach_Resorts on Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports.ResortID = Beach_Resorts.ResortID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?beach_resorts_water_sports a :Beach_Resorts_Water_Sports .
  ?water_sports a :Water_Sports .
  ?beach_resorts_water_sports p:hasWater_Sports ?water_sports .
  ?beach_resorts a :Beach_Resorts .
  ?beach_resorts_water_sports p:hasBeach_Resorts ?beach_resorts .
  ?beach_resorts p:name ?name .
  ?water_sports p:Description ?description .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What are the water sports activities and descriptions available for every beach resort?
List the water sports available in each beach resort.
Describe the water sports every beach resort has.
